scripts.dev: concurrently --names "🧩 CLIENT 🧩,🤖 SERVER 🤖" --prefix "[{name}]" --timestamp --timestamp-format "HH:mm:ss" --prefix-colors "yellow,green" "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "🧩 CLIENT 🧩,🤖 SERVER 🤖" --prefix "[{name}]" --timestamp --timestamp-format "HH:mm:ss" --prefix-colors "yellow,green" "npm run start --prefix client" "npm run start --prefix server"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
